name: Filling Apple-Filling Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the apples and blend them with sugar and cinnamon. Set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, beat all batter ingredients together.
3. Pour half of the batter into a greased tube pan.
4. Spread half of the filling mixture over the batter.
5. Pour the remaining batter on top, followed by the rest of the filling as a topping.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
7. No frosting is needed.
